name: an architect-generated ADR tree audits through the composite engine to one normalized tree verdict
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect.sh" 'build a booking service' --decisions-stub storage,auth --adr-out adrs --now 2026-06-20T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root adrs 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'composite-audit root=.* status=(green|incomplete)' e.txt && echo architect-tree-audited 1>&2
